---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem would this solve?**
Describe the workflow or item type that is currently awkward or
impossible.

**Proposed behaviour**
What would you like the plugin to do? Be concrete — which menu item,
which preference, what gets written to which Zotero field.

**Alternatives considered**
Existing workarounds, related plugins, or other approaches you ruled
out.

**Additional context**
Links to source-API docs, example records, screenshots, anything that
would help scope the work.
